originalTitle: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
content: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.

originalTitle: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
title: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
content: Some 26 million people are "facing extreme hunger" in Kenya, Ethiopia and Somalia, warns humanitarian organisation Oxfam.

originalTitle: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
title: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
content: It comes during the Nigerian president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

originalTitle: State of emergency declared as Iranian missile hits Arad in southern Israel
title: State of emergency declared as Iranian missile hits Arad in southern Israel
content: A state of emergency has been declared in Arad, southern Israel after an Iranian missile strike.

originalTitle: US says it has crippled Iranian threat in Strait of Hormuz
title: US says it has crippled Iranian threat in Strait of Hormuz
content: The US says it hit Iranian coastal missile sites and infrastructure, crippling Tehran’s threat to the Strait of Hormuz.

originalTitle: ‘Tears and grief’: Mother’s Day in Gaza marked by mourning
title: ‘Tears and grief’: Mother’s Day in Gaza marked by mourning
content: Day of intense hardship as mothers mourn children lost in war and children face day without their mothers.

originalTitle: Trump administration at crossroads in US-Israel war with Iran
title: Trump administration at crossroads in US-Israel war with Iran
content: Statements from President Trump that the war is almost over are not matching up with the reality on the ground.

originalTitle: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
content: Two children, aged 11 and 15, were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

originalTitle: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached
title: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached
content: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.

originalTitle: 'If Liverpool play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'
title: 'If Liverpool play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'
content: Arne Slot needs answers quickly or Liverpool's unwanted records may no longer be his only worry.

title: Spurs v Forest - the 'disarray derby' key to survival hopes
content: Chaos clubs Tottenham Hotspur and Nottingham Forest are battling to survive in the Premier League - and face each other on Sunday.

originalTitle: Why McInnes thinks 'huge underdogs' Hearts will get stronger
title: Why McInnes thinks 'huge underdogs' Hearts will get stronger
content: Hearts head coach Derek McInnes says they "will get stronger" in the final seven games. With players returning to bolster his squad, you can see why.
